## Summary

Describe the behavior change and user impact.

## Validation

List the commands or smoke checks you ran. For documentation-only changes,
include the text checks you used.

## Checklist

- [ ] Local source session files remain read-only.
- [ ] Private prompts, secrets, raw session logs, and proprietary paths are not
  included.
- [ ] Web and TUI behavior are both considered when shared user-visible behavior
  changes.
